description: A sales manager has just returned from a planning session with client 'Meridian Corp'. Organize the account by creating a folder named 'Meridian-Q4' and moving 5 existing emails from the Inbox into it. Additionally, prepare three draft emails (do not send): one to 'j.chen@meridian-corp.com' with subject 'Thank You - Q4 Planning Session' (body must include 'thank you' and 'meeting'); one to 'engineering@mycompany.com' with subject 'Action Items - Meridian Q4 Integration' (body must contain at least 3 bulleted action items); and one to 'director@mycompany.com' with subject 'Meeting Summary - Meridian Account' (body must mention 'Meridian' and 'next steps').
